stylePrompt: RiskyStars spatial UI wireframe at 1536x832. Dark starfield/game-map background, thin green panel borders, semi-transparent black panels, terminal-style labels, simple rectangles for controls, and fixed screen-relative geometry. The output is a precise layout baseline, not a Mermaid flowchart.

screens.title: Main menu
screens.prompt: Main menu command deck. Large framed starfield viewport. RiskyStars title centered at top. Sector brief text block on the left. Command Actions panel on the right with Multiplayer, Single Player, Tutorial Mode, Settings, and Exit buttons. Footer shows default uplink and build.

screens.title: Main menu settings
screens.prompt: Main menu settings screen. Same framed command deck. Centered settings panel with server endpoint, display profile, and visual palette sections in a bounded scroller. Fixed Save Settings and Back buttons at the bottom.

screens.title: Main menu connecting
screens.prompt: Connecting state. Same framed command deck with a centered uplink panel. The panel contains Establishing Uplink and a progress/status line.

screens.title: Game mode selector
screens.prompt: Game mode selection. Wide framed command deck. Header at top, two large mode cards in the main panel, Continue and Back buttons under the cards.

screens.title: Connection screen
screens.prompt: Multiplayer uplink connection screen. Wide framed panel with player identity field, server endpoint field, connection status, and Connect/Back action buttons on the right.

screens.title: Lobby browser
screens.prompt: Game lobby browser. Wide framed panel with title, lobby list table occupying most of the center, and Create Lobby, Join Lobby, Refresh actions.

screens.title: Create lobby
screens.prompt: Create lobby form. Wide framed panel with map selection, maximum commanders, lobby options, and Create/Cancel action buttons.

screens.title: Multiplayer lobby
screens.prompt: Multiplayer lobby. Wide framed panel with lobby metadata at top, commander slot table in the middle, ready buttons at the right, and bottom lobby actions.

screens.title: Single-player lobby
screens.prompt: Single-player game setup. Wide framed panel with map/name cards at top, server status card, scrollable opponent lineup table, and Start Game/Back actions.

screens.title: Gameplay HUD top bar
screens.prompt: In-game HUD. Full-width top bar with turn/status text on left, resource chips below, and shortcut hints on the right. Map viewport below with left and right docking rails.

screens.title: Gameplay HUD legend
screens.prompt: In-game map with right-side Map Key panel docked under the selection panel area. Legend rows show system orbit, stellar body, region marker, and lane mouth.

screens.title: Side panel container
screens.prompt: Gameplay screen emphasizing left and right side panel containers. Side rails are fixed-height dock areas with scrollable content and small top tool buttons.

screens.title: Settings window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Settings dockable window in the center-left. Window has title bar, tabs, bounded scroll body, and fixed Apply/Cancel footer.

screens.title: Debug information window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Debug Information dockable window. Window contains camera, performance, game state, and visual tree inspection sections inside a scroller.

screens.title: Player dashboard window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Player Dashboard dockable window. Window has resources, purchase controls, and hero controls in a scrollable body.

screens.title: AI visualization window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with AI Visualization dockable window. Window has AI status, toggles, selected player, and activity log sections.

screens.title: Encyclopedia window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Encyclopedia dockable window. Window is a split layout with navigation list at left and scrollable article body at right.

screens.title: UI scale window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with UI Scale dockable window. Compact window with scale slider, preset controls, Apply, and Reset.

screens.title: Tutorial mode window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Tutorial Mode docked to the left edge of the map content, right of the left rail. Window has fixed title, bounded body sections, and stable Back/Next/End footer buttons.

screens.title: Continent zoom window
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with Planet Zoom window over the map. Window contains header text and a large XNA-hosted circular planet surface with continent boundaries and labels.

screens.title: Combat HUD overlay
screens.prompt: Combat HUD overlay. Dim gameplay background. Large dark red combat panel centered-left with title, attacking/defending sides, rolls, pairings, casualties, and survivors.

screens.title: Server status indicator
screens.prompt: Gameplay HUD emphasizing server status indicator in the left rail/top controls area. Indicator shows state dot, status text, and detail line.

screens.title: Dialog manager
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with centered modal dialog. Dialog contains title, wrapped message, two action buttons, and a dimmed backdrop.

screens.title: Combat event dialog
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with centered combat event modal. Larger dialog with combat summary, region/body context, and OK/Start action.

screens.title: Context menu manager
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with a context menu opened near a selected region. Menu is anchored to map click position and lists contextual actions.

screens.title: Combat screen
screens.prompt: XNA combat screen. Large red-bordered combat presentation panel with title/status at top, attackers left, defenders right, and resolution details below.

screens.title: Legacy player dashboard
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with legacy XNA player dashboard panel visible. Narrow command panel with player resources and actions.

screens.title: AI action indicator
screens.prompt: Gameplay map with AI action indicator overlay and activity log. Indicator highlights an active AI action while map systems remain visible.
